utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget — total 7 items. (3) transportation: flight details with costs – includes airline, type, departure/arrival, price, currency, and taxes – fully specified. (4) accommodation: includes name, location, rating, price, nights, amenities, currency – fully specified. (5) activities: includes name, location, duration, price, participants, total – fully specified. (6) additional_services: present but lacks costs (has only description and status, no price) – thus not fully specified. (7) total_budget: includes cost breakdown for flights, accommodation, activities, dining, total, and currency – fully specified. Therefore, 6 of 7 items are fully covered.
